fixes_applied.description: Removed standalone Elements class definition and restructured file to show selector strings as additions to existing PrintHistoryPage.Elements inner class. Added clear section headers separating Elements class additions from PrintHistoryPage class method additions.

Restructured property methods to clearly indicate they are additions to PrintHistoryPage class body (not Elements inner class, not standalone functions). Added proper indentation (4 spaces) to show these are class methods. Added clear section header 'PART 2: Property Methods' with explicit instructions.

Replaced unclear merge instructions with comprehensive two-part instructions. Part 1 explains adding selector strings to Elements inner class. Part 2 explains adding property methods to PrintHistoryPage class body. Removed confusing instruction about not adding __init__ property initializations. Added clear verification steps.

post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: RESTRUCTURE (removing standalone class wrapper, adding proper indentation and section headers)
post_fix_summary.expected_score_improvement: 100 (all 3 violations resolved: 2 CRITICAL + 1 MODERATE = 9 points recovered)
